## Vertick IME 1.2.3

### English

- Complete Rime-Ice Pinyin data is precompiled and bundled in the APK. A new installation unpacks and loads the table directly instead of compiling approximately 1.8 million entries on the device.
- Pinyin typing is ready immediately after installation, with no first-run dictionary preparation screen or high memory build.
- Fixed Rime readiness validation so it opens the bundled schema once without repeated dictionary reloads or maintenance.
- Added a candidate fallback so an incompatible table cannot leave an empty matching strip.

### 简体中文

- 完整 Rime-Ice 拼音数据已预编译并随 APK 提供。新安装只需解压并加载词典，不再在设备上编译约 188 万条词条。
- 安装后即可使用拼音键盘，不再显示首次词典准备或触发高内存编译。
- 修复 Rime 就绪验证，仅打开一次内置方案，不再反复重载或维护词典。
- 增加候选保护，异常词典表不会留下空的匹配候选栏。
